description: DocuSeal is an electronic signature and document workflow service for creating templates, sending documents for signature, and tracking submissions. It offers cloud and EU-hosted API endpoints, with support for self-hosted deployments in its broader product.
summary: DocuSeal exposes a token-authenticated REST API with an OpenAPI spec, an OAuth-protected MCP server at `https://docuseal.com/mcp`, and an npm-distributed `docuseal` CLI that uses the same API token.
